prompt: Create a dreamy cinematic square portrait titled around the feeling of dream time: a Japanese teenage schoolgirl in a dark navy sailor uniform with white striped collar and a muted reddish-brown necktie sits on a soft bed beside a large plush-like imaginary creature. The girl has long straight black hair with bangs, her face hidden in deep shadow/soft blur, sitting slightly hunched and quiet, hands near her lap. The creature is about the size of a seated child, pale dusty pink-beige, fuzzy and suede-textured, with a rounded pear-shaped body, two long curved antennae/horns, oversized glossy blue-black eyes, a tiny downturned mouth, short arms, and folded legs, posed close to her like a silent companion. The setting is a cozy pastel bedroom at night or twilight: pink mauve walls, rumpled blue bedding, a warm vintage bedside lamp with a fringed cream shade on the left, a pale pink balloon floating in the background, faint framed wall art, and soft cloudlike shapes near the ceiling. Use a nostalgic analog film look with low contrast, muted pink-blue color grading, shallow depth of field, gentle haze, dreamy bloom around highlights, subtle grain, slight vignette, and a thin dark border like an old square film photograph. Keep the composition intimate and centered, with exactly two main subjects: 1 girl and 1 fantasy creature. No readable text, no extra characters, no watermark.
